args: const { spawn } = require('node:child_process'); const bin = process.env.ENGRAM_BIN || 'engram'; const child = spawn(bin, ['mcp', '--tools=agent'], { stdio: 'inherit' }); child.on('error', () => process.exit(127)); child.on('exit', (code, signal) => { if (typeof code === 'number') process.exit(code); process.kill(process.pid, signal || 'SIGTERM'); });
